description: derive() with MergeStrategy::Merge unions variables (base {extraction} + overlay {sentiment} → {extraction, sentiment}), then renders with both. Includes a metadata value with a decimal string to exercise the D1 canonical serialized-form invariant: the shared merge_definitions helper must keep the value byte-identical across bindings (SC-003, research R7, spec 017 T017).
note: expected_render.{template_hash,render_hash} are populated by the Rust golden generator (conformance:regen). The initial empty strings are replaced on first regen run. The structural assertions (variables union, metadata union) are the primary parity contract.
